itemReviewed.name: Mowgli's Land – Play School - E-6,Arera Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody:
As a parent, finding the right preschool is a big decision, and I couldn't be happier with my choice (Mowgli's Land) in Bhopal. The teachers are dedicated professionals, and the supporting staff are equally committed to creating a nurturing environment.
The Cambridge curriculum is engaging and thoughtfully designed to foster early learning. What truly sets this preschool apart is its kid-friendly architecture.  It's rare to find such thoughtfully designed spaces for small kids in this vicinity.
My son's early education was in excellent hands here. I'm forever grateful for the dedication of the teachers and staff, who've clearly put in a lot of time and effort. I've seen positive changes in my Son, especially in their writing and speaking abilities.
Overall, this is a top-notch preschool in Bhopal. My son enjoys a well-rounded experience with study, sports, dance, roleplays and a creative curriculum.
I highly recommend it to other parents!

itemReviewed.name: Mowgli's Land – Play School - E-6,Arera Colony

itemListElement.reviewBody:
First Session just end with an awesome annual function. We get to know about Mowgli's Land at a Kiosk they had setup in DB city mall almost a year ago and at the same time as we were looking to enroll our child for her first ever school session. We visited Mowgli's Land the very next day and to our surprise and being very honest have not seen any pre school with such beautiful infrastructure and facilities. And at that same moment we decided that Reyanshi will study here. We have seen a 360° drastic changes in our child in a very positive way. Being a covid time birth child she was very introvert and non talkative. Now she has become totally opposite of that and even started taking decisions on her own about the positives and negatives of every lil situation. We are extremely happy and obliged to the whole staff and teachers of Mowgli's Land for all the efforts they have put in our child's social and emotional growth. Looking forward for the new session and new exciting times at Mowgli's Land. Cheers!

P. S. : wish they extend it to high school :)

All of the teachers are so kind to each child, truly encouraging each to their strengths.I am confident that this school has set a solid foundation for kids learning path and that they have developed a true love for learning.My child Abhimanyu ♥️s to attend and learn. I am overwhelmed that we made the BEST choice for our child at MOWGLIS LAND.
